description: Machine-readable manifest of every task-worker-api consumer in the SyngularXR fleet. Source of truth for backend handler routing, deployment health checks, and SDK-upgrade automation. Fetch via the GitHub raw URL — see docs/fleet/README.md for the canonical link.

sdk.name: task-worker-api
sdk.release_workflow: .github/workflows/release.yml — publishes wheel + tag on every merge to main

workers.mode_description: Runs FastAPI app + task worker on one event loop via run_hybrid(). Falls back to FastAPI-only if SYNPUSHER_URL or WORKER_API_KEY are missing — safe for API-only deployments.
workers.notes: Hybrid mode runs --workers 1 (down from 2) because run_hybrid is one process; GPU-bound so single model-cache process is more efficient than 2 competing copies.

workers.mode_description: Standalone Worker.run_forever() polling loop; no FastAPI side.

sdk_pin.upgrade_pending: v0.5.0 dep-bump PR #29 open; main branch CI is currently red on unrelated pre-existing tests (Solid_Mat material rename, export_glb function rename) which need a separate fix.

workers.notes: graphics capability required for Blender OpenGL/Vulkan/EGL rendering.

workers.mode_description: Standalone Worker.run_forever() polling loop. Gated on ENABLE_TASK_WORKER=true. Worker lives under worker/ in the Unity project repo.
workers.notes: Unity CLI build integration deferred to a future session (build-bundle.sh). v0.1.0 handler validates content folder exists and is non-empty; raises TaskParamsError for empty/missing folders.

workers.mode_description: Standalone Worker.run_forever() polling loop. Image's baked-in CMD is ['--help'] (back-compat with legacy 'docker run colmap-splat --help' callers); worker mode is gated on ENABLE_TASK_WORKER=true env var.

sdk_pin.build_dependency: Dockerfile must pre-install hatchling (task-worker-api's PEP 517 backend) because requirements.txt installs run with --no-build-isolation for torch/CUDA pinning.

workers.notes: Per-process payload-log filenames (PID + 8-char boot id) ensure scaled replicas with one shared WORKER_ID don't corrupt JSONL via interleaved appends.

WORKER_PAYLOAD_LOG_ENABLED.description: Master kill switch for payload logging. Set 'false' to disable the JSONL capture stream entirely; cleanup of existing files still runs.

WORKER_PAYLOAD_LOG_RETENTION_DAYS.description: Files older than this are deleted at worker startup, on UTC date rollover, and on a periodic timer. Bad/zero/negative values fall back to 14 with a WARNING.

WORKER_PAYLOAD_LOG_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_S.description: Periodic cleanup interval (seconds). Keeps idle workers honest between rollover events. Tighter intervals are useful for tests.
